title: Web Cache Deception Vulnerability
description: The server returns the same content for 'http://host.docker.internal:3001' and 'http://host.docker.internal:3001/nonexistent.css', and the response appears to be cached. An attacker can trick a victim into visiting the deception URL, causing their authenticated response to be cached publicly.
remediation: Configure the cache to only store responses based on content-type, not URL extension. Return 404 for invalid path suffixes.

evidence.description: Authenticated content served with cache headers

title: Site Not Using HTTPS
description: The target is served over HTTP, not HTTPS. All traffic is unencrypted.
remediation: Enable HTTPS with a valid TLS certificate. Redirect all HTTP to HTTPS.

title: Browser Crawl Complete
description: Playwright browser crawl discovered 230 unique endpoints from 200 pages (including JS-rendered routes). 36 API calls intercepted from network traffic.
remediation: Review discovered endpoints for attack surface.

title: Missing Security Header: x-xss-protection
description: X-XSS-Protection not set. Legacy XSS filter not explicitly configured.
remediation: Add 'X-XSS-Protection: 0' (rely on CSP instead) or '1; mode=block'.

evidence.description: Header 'x-xss-protection' is absent from the response

title: Missing Security Header: referrer-policy
description: Referrer-Policy not set. Full URL may leak to external sites via Referer header.
remediation: Add 'Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin'.

evidence.description: Header 'referrer-policy' is absent from the response

title: Missing Security Header: permissions-policy
description: Permissions-Policy not set. Browser features (camera, mic, geolocation) not restricted.
remediation: Add 'Permissions-Policy' header to restrict unused browser features.

evidence.description: Header 'permissions-policy' is absent from the response

title: Missing DMARC Record
description: No DMARC record found. Email spoofing protection is incomplete.
remediation: Add a DMARC TXT record at _dmarc.domain with at least p=none for monitoring.

title: Missing SPF Record
description: No SPF record found. The domain may be vulnerable to email spoofing.
remediation: Add an SPF TXT record to specify authorized mail servers.

title: No Rate Limiting on Sensitive Endpoint
description: 30 rapid requests to http://host.docker.internal:3001#/forgot-password completed in 3.1s with no rate limiting (no 429 responses, no rate limit headers). Vulnerable to brute force and abuse.
remediation: Implement rate limiting. Return 429 with Retry-After header. Use progressive delays for repeated failed attempts.

title: No Rate Limiting on Sensitive Endpoint
description: 30 rapid requests to http://host.docker.internal:3001#/register completed in 3.1s with no rate limiting (no 429 responses, no rate limit headers). Vulnerable to brute force and abuse.
remediation: Implement rate limiting. Return 429 with Retry-After header. Use progressive delays for repeated failed attempts.

title: No Rate Limiting on Sensitive Endpoint
description: 30 rapid requests to http://host.docker.internal:3001/login?return_to=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fjuice-shop%2Fjuice-shop completed in 3.1s with no rate limiting (no 429 responses, no rate limit headers). Vulnerable to brute force and abuse.
remediation: Implement rate limiting. Return 429 with Retry-After header. Use progressive delays for repeated failed attempts.

title: No Rate Limiting on Sensitive Endpoint
description: 30 rapid requests to http://host.docker.internal:3001/login?return_to=%2Fjuice-shop%2Fjuice-shop completed in 3.1s with no rate limiting (no 429 responses, no rate limit headers). Vulnerable to brute force and abuse.
remediation: Implement rate limiting. Return 429 with Retry-After header. Use progressive delays for repeated failed attempts.

title: Missing Host Header Validation (DNS Rebinding Risk)
description: The server accepts requests with arbitrary Host headers (tested: '127.0.0.1'). This makes the application susceptible to DNS rebinding attacks, where an attacker's domain resolves to the target's internal IP, bypassing same-origin policy and accessing internal services.
remediation: Validate the Host header against a whitelist of expected values. Return 400/403 for unrecognized Host values. Bind services to specific hostnames, not 0.0.0.0.

evidence.description: Spoofed Host '127.0.0.1' accepted — same response as legitimate host

title: Missing Security Header: strict-transport-security
description: HSTS not set. Browser can be MITM'd to HTTP.
remediation: Add 'Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains'.

evidence.description: Header 'strict-transport-security' is absent from the response

title: Missing Security Header: content-security-policy
description: CSP not set. No protection against XSS and data injection.
remediation: Implement a Content-Security-Policy header. Start with 'default-src self'.

evidence.description: Header 'content-security-policy' is absent from the response

title: CORS Wildcard Origin Allowed
description: The server responds with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *. Any website can read responses from this origin.
remediation: Restrict CORS to specific trusted origins instead of wildcard.

title: No Account Lockout or Rate Limiting
description: 10 failed login attempts produced no lockout or rate limiting. The endpoint is vulnerable to brute force attacks.
remediation: Implement account lockout after 5 failed attempts. Add rate limiting (e.g., progressive delays). Use CAPTCHA after failures.

title: High-Risk Port Exposed: 5432 (PostgreSQL)
description: Port 5432 (PostgreSQL (database direct access)) is exposed to the network. This service should not be directly accessible from the internet.
remediation: Restrict access to port 5432 using firewall rules. Only allow connections from trusted IP ranges.

title: Weak Password Accepted: 'password'
description: The application accepted the weak password 'password'. This allows users to set easily guessable passwords.
remediation: Enforce minimum password requirements: 8+ characters, mixed case, numbers, and special characters. Check against breach databases.

title: HTTP Method Override Accepted
description: Server honors X-HTTP-Method-Override header. This may allow bypassing method-based access controls.
remediation: Disable HTTP method override headers. Enforce method restrictions at the framework level.

title: Server Error on Fuzz Input (json_object)
description: Parameter 'name' with fuzz value 'json_object' caused a 500 error. Improper input handling may lead to exploitation.
remediation: Validate and sanitize all input. Handle edge cases gracefully.

title: No Rate Limiting on Sensitive Endpoint
description: 30 rapid requests to http://host.docker.internal:3001#/login completed in 3.1s with no rate limiting (no 429 responses, no rate limit headers). Vulnerable to brute force and abuse.
remediation: Implement rate limiting. Return 429 with Retry-After header. Use progressive delays for repeated failed attempts.
